about_item: PET'S COMFORT SPACE: This dog crate, measuring 23.6L x 19.7W x 25.6H inches, is perfect for small dog breeds weighing up to 25 pounds. The large space is enough to support the dog's training,standing,turning,playing,and sleeping comfortably

CHARGING STATION & STORAGE: The top panel features a power strip with 2 USB ports and 2 AC outlets for charging your phones or your dog's electronic toys. The tabletop can hold a lamp, while the flip-top drawer keeps toys, accessories, and pet essentials organized and within reach

DURABLE AND SAFE DESIGN: Constructed with sturdy steel tube to deter chewing and prevent pets from getting trapped, this crate ensures your pet's safety. The quality is strong enough to survive the use of anxious puppies,and strong locks don't make a lot of noise

VERSATILE USES: The dog kennel serves as a functional side table that also doubles as a cozy resting spot for your pet and stylish furniture piece; Its innovative design saves space and adds a unique element to your home decor, blending utility and style

EASY ASSEMBLY: Crafted from thick, easy-to-clean particleboard and sturdy iron tube, this dog kennel furniture boasts a simple design. With the provided illustrated manual and installation tools, you can set up a warm house for your beloved pet

summary.text: Customers find the dog crate furniture easy to assemble and appreciate its good quality and appearance, with one noting it's a beautiful combination of kennel and end table. The product receives positive feedback for its size, durability, and functionality, with one customer mentioning it works well as an end table. While some customers find the instructions easy to follow, others find them terrible, and several report issues with the door not closing properly.

insights.title: Assembly
insights.summary: Customers find the dog crate easy to assemble, with one mentioning that the instructions and packing were excellent.

examples.snippet: ...Beautiful combination of kennel and end table. Easy to put together. Not too heavy to move and very sturdy, my dog loves it too....
Great size for my new puppy the nightstand with plug is a plus easy to assemble adding the door comes off of the hinges from time to time
Happy with this. It was very easy to put together and looks great. My only complaint is the door doesn’t close very well....
...than I expected and came in WAY later than it said and the top piece didn’t line up at all so it’s just sitting on top of it but it is pretty

Perfect!

insights.title: Functionality

...My pup hopped right in it when I put her bed in. The instructions leave something to be desired....

insights.title: Closure
insights.summary: Customers report issues with the closure of the dog crate, noting that the door doesn't close properly and the latch is difficult to operate.

examples.snippet: ...My only complaint is the door doesn’t close very well....
...cage itself was put together I went to close the door and it did not line up to lock it. I thought I did something wrong but I didn't....
...Very well made, good quality other than the latch which doesn't move easily. You're going to need to give it some wd-40
...Wish the top drawer was accessible from the front. It opens front the top, limiting what you can place on top.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect!
authors_reviews.text: Just the right size for my Shitzu. He loves it and feels secure in it. I like it because it’s sturdy, easy to put together and he can see what’s going on vs having the feeling of being locked in.♥️
authors_reviews.author: Deanna

authors_reviews.title: Nice looking your home
authors_reviews.text: My favorite crate. Nice looking, sturdy, easy assembly, my pets love it!
authors_reviews.author: Crista

authors_reviews.title: Looks amazing Very durable!
authors_reviews.text: Very durable perfect size for my dog. Very easy to put together.
authors_reviews.author: qiana allen

authors_reviews.title: Very nice dog crate.
authors_reviews.text: Great dog crate. Very easy to assemble and appears very sturdy. The plugs up top and storage are super nice. Just big enough for a small dog cage. Look at the cages dimensions and if it’s what you’re looking for, get it.
authors_reviews.author: Kevin Dobson

authors_reviews.title: Aesthetically pleasing, storage, works well as an end table
authors_reviews.text: Love this kennel for my small dog. Very well made, good quality other than the latch which doesn't move easily. You're going to need to give it some wd-40
authors_reviews.author: Kristi Rice

authors_reviews.title: Dog Crate/End Table
authors_reviews.text: Exactly what I was looking for. Beautiful combination of kennel and end table. Easy to put together. Not too heavy to move and very sturdy, my dog loves it too. Added a pet bed and she is very comfortable. Put it in my bedroom for her to sleep at night!
authors_reviews.author: Joyce A Dowdell

authors_reviews.title: Fabulous
authors_reviews.text: Love this so much. It looks good and my pup loves it.
authors_reviews.author: Julie Heinrichs

authors_reviews.title: Worth the investment
authors_reviews.text: Perfect size for my 12 lb dog. The drawer is handy for treats and toys.
authors_reviews.author: Kristine Wong
